title: OSUK Black 24x20 Inch Size Photo Frame - Plain Flat Style Black 20" x 24" Picture Frame with Clear Perspex Front Wall Picture Frame With Hanging Hooks (24'' x 20'' (60.96 x 50.8cm))
features: MATERIAL: These frames are made of synthetic wood MDF boards strong like wood does not have knots or kinks which disturbs the smooth surface, Perfect for your gallery wall decoration. Moulding Width 30mm and Moulding Depth 15mm.
DISPLAY ORIENTATION: The photo frame can be hung portrait or landscape.
READY FRAME: Our frames comes with Styrene (plastic glass), MDF backing, & hooks, So you dont have to buy anything separately.

SAFE & SECURE : We supply frames with plastic glass (Styrene). Styrene is a low-cost lightweight and shatter-resistant glazing material. Ideal where safety is a consideration, but does require careful handling
IMPORTANT NOTE: Peel off the protective sheet from both sides of the Perspex sheet. Picture display in the frame will not supply the item.

PROTECTIVE PACKAGING AND FAST DISPATCH: We try to provide quality packing so you don’t have to worry about any damage. But if your parcel gets damaged during transit we will be happy to replace it as quick as possible.
description: Moulding Dimensions: Width of the molding: 30mm Depth of the molding: 15mm Material: Frame made of MDF Wood with foil wrap MDF backing board at the back of the frame Styrene Protective sheet at front Hanging hooks Other Features: These frames can be use in both orientations landscape and portrait. For example 12x10inch frame can also be used to frame a 10x12 inch picture. The listed sizes you are buying is the actual glass (picture/photo) size that will fit in the frame and not an overall size of the frame. These frames comes with Shatter proof styrene to cover the image and styrene itself is protected by an protective film which will make sure it reaches you in perfect condition, just remember to remove it from both sides of the styrenep>
